components.name: Primary Action Button
components.description: The main CTA for scholarship matching and registration.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.517 0.153 163), oklch(0.6 0.118 184.704)); color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; border: none; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.4); }

components.name: Glass Feature Card
components.description: Used in the Hero section for AI feature highlights.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; color: #fff; } .ds-card-glass h3 { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #fff; } .ds-card-glass p { opacity: 0.6; font-size: 0.875rem; }

narrative.overview: ScholarAid follows a Dual-State Narrative, moving students from the 'Darkness of Uncertainty' in the hero to the 'Clarity of Light' in the application tools.

rules.name: The 10% Emerald Rule
rules.body: Emerald is a reward; it must never exceed 10% of any tool-heavy screen.

rules.name: The Response Elevation Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default. Depth is only a response to interaction.

dos: Do use the Resilient Navigation pattern
